title: Visual improvement
body:
![Minecraft Visual Improvement](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b19757e0944c372ed82cf8f4ae6bdb9f6da27e1.png)
✨ **A client-side modpack for a comfortable and beautiful Minecraft experience!**

This modpack is designed for those who want to refresh their Minecraft experience without complicating it with unnecessary mechanics. The entire pack works exclusively on the client side, which means you can use it even on regular servers without needing to install any additional mods server-side.

📷 **Visual enhancements:**
The world of Minecraft will shine with new colors! Improved animations, detailed textures, and refined interfaces make the game not only easier on the eyes but also more immersive. Everything looks modern while still preserving the spirit of the original game.

🔧 **Convenience and comfort:**
The modpack includes small but useful quality-of-life mods that simplify everyday gameplay:
-  A more user-friendly inventory and map;
-  Item and recipe tooltips;
-  Subtle but helpful UI tweaks.

🧩 **No unnecessary complexity:**
The modpack isn't overloaded with content and is perfect for vanilla-style play as well as mod-free servers. It doesn’t add new ores, dimensions, or complicated systems — just smart improvements that make the game more enjoyable and convenient.

🎮 **Perfect for everyday play:**
Whether you’re playing survival or creative, this modpack fits right in. You can use it in singleplayer, on public servers, or in private games with friends — no restrictions!

## Mods

<details>
<summary>Optimization mods</summary>

- **Bobby** – Allows render distances beyond the server's view-distance
- **Concurrent** Chunk Management Engine – Improves chunk performance
- **DashLoader** – Speeds up game launch
- **Debugify** – Fixes bugs from the official bug tracker
- **Dynamic FPS** – Reduces resource use in background or idle
- **EntityCulling** – Hides unseen blocks/entities with async tracing
- **FastBoot** – Drastically shortens loading time
- **FerriteCore** – Optimizes memory usage
- **ImmediatelyFast** – Speeds up immediate-mode rendering
- **Krypton** – Optimizes networking stack
- **LazyDFU** – Defers non-essential loading to speed up boot
- **Lithium** – Game logic optimizations for client and server
- **Memory Leak Fix** – Fixes memory leaks
- **MixinTrace** – Shows mixins in crash stack traces
- **ModernFix** – Boosts performance, cuts memory use, fixes bugs
- **More Culling** – Improves performance via better culling
- **Smooth Skies** – Fixes skybox visuals and smooths colors
- **Sodium** – Fast, compatible rendering optimization
- **Sodium Dynamic Lights** – Adds dynamic lights with Sodium support
- **Sodium Extra** – Adds extra features to Sodium
- **Sodium Options API** – Adds better config options for Sodium
- **Starlight** – Rewrites light engine for speed and fewer errors
- **Language Reload** – Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages
- **Model Gap Fix** – Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models
- **Hold That Chunk** – Delays client chunk unloading
- **Indium** – Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API


</details>

<details>
<summary>Visual mods</summary>

- **Smooth Swapping** – Smooth inventory item movement
- **'Slight' GUI Modifications** – Slight GUI tweaks
- **3d-Skin-Layers** – 3D player skin layers
- **Advancement Plaques** – Flashy advancement popups
- **Better Trim Tooltips** – Compact trim tooltips
- **BetterF3** – Customizable debug HUD
- **CameraOverhaul** – Smooth camera movement
- **Chat Heads** – See chat avatars
- **Chunks Fade In** – Chunk fade-in animation
- **Eating Animation** – Eating/drinking animations
- **Enhanced Block Entities** – Optimized & improved block entities
- **Entity Model Features** – CEM support for Fabric/Forge
- **Entity Texture Features** – Emissive & random entity textures
- **Equipment Compare** – Compare gear tooltips
- **FancyBlockParticles** – 3D digging particles
- **FirstPersonModel** – 3rd person model in 1st-person
- **Flash** – Screen flash on screenshot
- **Item Highlighter** – Highlights picked-up items
- **ImmersiveUI** – Animated UI elements
- **ItemPhysicLite** – Realistic item physics
- **Jade** – Info HUD for blocks/entities
- **Jade Addons** – Extra Jade mod support
- **Legendary Tooltips** – Fancy item tooltips
- **NotEnoughAnimations** – 3rd-person animations in 1st-person
- **Particular** – Ambient effects (fireflies, leaves, etc.)
- **Satisfying Buttons** – Enhanced button feedback
- **Scoreboard Overhaul** – Improved scoreboard UI
- **Shulker Box Tooltip** – View box contents in inventory
- **Smooth Scroll** – Smooth UI scrolling
- **Spawn Animations** – Mob spawn effects
- **Subtle Effects** – Extra particles & sounds
- **SuperFancyClouds: Rearchitected** – Fancy vanilla-style clouds
- **Traveler’s Titles** – RPG-style biome titles
- **Vectorientation** – Falling block rotation
- **Visual Workbench** – Items render in crafting table
- **Visuality** – Extra ambient particles
- **Wakes** – Water travel splash effects
- **WaveyCapes** – Wavy cape physics
- **World Play Time** – Shows play time on world screen
- **Better Ping Display** – Ping in player list
- **Continuity** – Connected textures support
- **Easy Anvils** – Better anvil UI & behavior
- **Easy Magic** – Improved enchanting table
- **Euphoria Patcher** – Add-ons for Complementary Shaders
- **Modern World Creation** – New world creation UI
- **Nyf’s Spiders** – More realistic spiders

</details>

<details>
<summary>Other mods</summary>

- **Remove Reloading Screen** – Loads resource packs in background
- **AmbientSounds** – Dynamic ambient sound system
- **Auditory** – Expanded sound & audio effects
- **Iris** – Shader loader compatible with OptiFine shaders
- **Main Menu Credits** – Custom info on title screen
- **Player Animator** – Player animation library
- **Prism** – Color utilities library
- **Presence Footsteps** – Detailed footstep sounds
- **Screenshot to Clipboard** – Copies screenshots to clipboard
- **Sound Physics Remastered** – Realistic sound propagation
- **Sounds** – Customizable sound effects
- **World Play Time** – Shows world play time
- **AppleSkin** – Food & hunger HUD info
- **Architectury** – Multiplatform modding API
- **Auto HUD** – Hides HUD dynamically
- **CICADA** – General-purpose dev aid
- **Cerbons API** – Core library for CERBON’s mods
- **Cherished Worlds** – Favorite & protect worlds
- **ClickThrough** – Click through signs/item frames
- **Cloth Config v11** – Config library
- **Collective** – Shared code for Serilum's mods
- **CreativeCore** – Required core mod
- **Draggable Lists** – Drag resource/datapacks & servers
- **Fabric API** – Core Fabric modding API
- **Fabric Language Kotlin** – Kotlin support for Fabric
- **Forge Config API Port** – Forge config API for Fabric
- **Fzzy Config** – Config API with GUI & sync
- **Fzzy Core** – Utilities for Kotlin-based mods
- **Iceberg** – Modding utilities library
- **Just Enough Items** – View items & recipes
- **Konkrete** – Basic library mod
- **Mod Menu** – Mod list GUI
- **M.R.U** – Core for IMB11’s mods
- **Mouse Tweaks** – Improved inventory control
- **OctoLib** – Shared code for OctoStudios mods
- **Ok Zoomer** – Simple zoom mod
- **Loot Journal** – Pickup notifications
- **Puzzles Lib** – Utility mod library
- **Resourcify** – In-game pack browser/updater
- **Runtime Resource Pack** – Runtime asset generation
- **Simple Voice Chat** – In-game voice chat
- **Surveyor Map Framework** – Framework for map mods
- **Sushi Bar** – Library for Chai’s mods
- **SwingThrough** – Attack through transparent blocks
- **YetAnotherConfigLib** – Config builder library
- **e4mc** – Open LAN to external players
- **oωo** – GUI/config utility lib
- **Antique Atlas** – Hand-drawn world map
- **YANG's Api** - yang's api
</details>

### Other
<details>
<summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- **Better Ender Eye** – Replaces ender eye and pearl textures
- **Better Icons** – Redesigned HUD icons
- **Cubic Sun & Moon** – 3D sun & moon with mod support
- **Fancy Crops** – Prettier mod-compatible crops
- **Fresh Animations** – Dynamic mob animations like trailers
- **Fresh Gui** – Enhanced GUI and HUD visuals
- **Just Expressions** – Player eye animations (EMF)
- **Icons** – Adds icons across the UI
- **No Z-Fighting** – Fixes texture flickering issues
- **Visual: Armor Trims** – Inventory armor trim display
- **Glowy Nether Portals** – Bright bordered portals, vanilla style
- **Extended Illumina (NEA)** – 3D lantern in hand + NEA support
  
</details>

**Complimentary Shaders** and **Complimentary Shaders +Eupharia Pathes**

### Extra

If you found any bugs, want to share your ideas for improving the modpack or just follow the updates, visit our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/CbRxXK4sTt)
